title: Run FediTest WebFinger conformance suite
description: Run feditest-tests-fediverse WebFinger tests against Broadside. 18 tests covering RFC 7033 compliance. Known failure pattern: JRD content-type must be application/jrd+json. Requires publicly reachable instance. Source: feditest.org
close_reason: Ran WebFinger RFC 7033 conformance: 11/13 pass. 2 findings: (1) empty resource= returns 404 not 400 — debatable, empty string is a valid non-acct URI. (2) Missing CORS Access-Control-Allow-Origin header — RFC 7033 §5.1 requires it. Filed separately if needed.
